title: Saksoft is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Saksoft is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Saksoft:
Saksoft is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
